response.justification: The candidate has roughly 13-16 years of solid full-stack software engineering experience with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, but the role demands a Director-level individual contributor with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud/AI strategy fluency at a principal level. The resume shows strong craftsmanship and breadth but lacks evidence of AI thought leadership, strategic advisory work, or large-scale cloud/AI platform ownership expected at this seniority.
strengths: Broad full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Track record of community engagement through workshops, talks, and open-source projects
concerns: No demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale to support a Principal/Director-level AI strategy role
Lacks strategic advisory, executive influence, or recognized industry expertise in AI
Cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK usage rather than deep cloud-platform architecture or strategy

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI strategy and recognized AI expertise
Seniority/scope mismatch for Principal/Director IC role
Relevant engineering breadth and emerging AI-agent work
